place: Plai Laem, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Contemporary Hillside Five-Bedroom Sea-View Villa, Plai Laem
blurb: A contemporary five-bedroom villa carved into a Plai Laem hillside — stacked travertine planes, walls of glass and an infinity pool opening to the sea. Around 782 m² of fully-furnished living on a 743 m² freehold plot, with a private gym and sauna, in a gated community. Off-plan, ฿49,900,000 fully furnished.
detail:
A study in warm, contemporary architecture, this five-bedroom villa steps down a Plai Laem hillside in stacked planes of travertine and glass, its horizontal terraces reaching toward the sea. Floor-to-ceiling glazing and deep, shaded overhangs open the living spaces fully to the view and the surrounding palms, while an infinity pool draws the eye to the horizon.

Inside, around 782 m² of living space is finished in a restrained, tactile palette — microcement, warm timber, natural stone and linen — across generous open-plan living, dining and kitchen volumes and five en-suite bedrooms. The interiors are delivered fully furnished and equipped, considered down to the lighting, joinery and art.

Wellness is built in, with a private gym and sauna alongside expansive covered terraces, an outdoor lounge and a dining pavilion above the pool. The home sits within a private, gated community on freehold Chanote-title land of about 743 m².

Offered off-plan with roughly twelve months to completion, the villa is priced at ฿49,900,000 fully furnished. The setting is a short drive from Samui International Airport, with the beaches, dining and marinas of Plai Laem, Choeng Mon and Bophut close at hand.
